title: Core Advantages of Learning at Cloud Intellect

advantages.title: 100% Practical & Hands-On Training
advantages.description: Learning at Cloud Intellect is focused on real-time Salesforce implementation, not theory.

advantages.title: Real-Time Experience Equivalent to Industry Exposure
advantages.description: Every learner works on live business use cases and project simulations, gaining experience aligned with real industry expectations.
bullets: Practical exposure equivalent to real project environments

advantages.title: Structured Assignments & Continuous Assessments
advantages.description: Learner progress is tracked through topic-wise assignments, quizzes, and real-world exercises.

advantages.title: Smart Learning Infrastructure (LMS + Student Portal)
advantages.description: Cloud Intellect provides a technology-enabled learning ecosystem through LMS and a dedicated student portal. Students can
bullets: Connect with mentors for 1:1 doubt sessions

advantages.title: Mentorship from Experienced Certified Trainers
advantages.description: All trainers at Cloud Intellect are active Salesforce professionals with strong project delivery experience.

advantages.title: Job-Oriented Curriculum & Career Focus
advantages.description: Our curriculum is continuously updated based on:
advantages.additionalText: Training is designed to deliver job readiness within a structured timeline, not just course completion.
